name: plugin-gauge
description: ElizaOS plugin — GAUGE: verifiable flood-risk, environmental & agriculture signals for AI agents via x402 (USDC on Base, no API key). Real-time river water level (gage height), streamflow, flood stage vs official USGS/NOAA thresholds; air quality (AQI/PM2.5); precipitation/drought; and agricultural drought (USDM D0–D4) + heat/GDD + crop vegetation health (NOAA VHI) for global grain belts. 5–44yr seasonal anomaly + record_hash provenance.
author: AEML-DS Vanished-Data Exchange
